functions.name: getUploadEnabled
functions.description: Returns the current value of the Thunderbird telemetry upload preference (datareporting.healthreport.uploadEnabled). Defaults to false (opted out) if the preference cannot be read.

returns.description: True if the user has telemetry upload enabled; false if the user has opted out or the preference cannot be read.

events.name: onChanged
events.description: Fires when the Thunderbird telemetry upload preference (datareporting.healthreport.uploadEnabled) changes, with the new value.
